summary: Iteration 5 — Voice-to-text (Whisper) feature tested end-to-end. Backend /api/visits/transcribe: 6/6 tests pass (401 no token, 400 empty body, 200 valid wav for TM/Manager/Admin, 413 oversize). Frontend LogVisit Step 2: voice-record-btn ('Voice note') + visit-note-textarea render correctly; voice-stop-btn correctly absent in idle state; MediaRecorder path verified by inspection (real mic unavailable in headless so recording -> transcribing flow not exercised live, but UI state machine and API wiring (POST /visits/transcribe via axios baseURL) are correct). Regression: 29/29 pass across test_iter4_itero_invisalign.py + test_commercial_and_control_tower.py. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1500+ lines — continues to grow; splitting routes into routers (auth/doctors/visits/dashboards) would improve maintainability. Non-blocking.
Transcribe endpoint returns 502 with raw exception string on Whisper failure (`detail=f'Transcription failed: {e}'`). Consider sanitizing to avoid leaking internal details in prod.

OpenAISpeechToText is imported inside the request handler on every call — fine for cold path but instantiating the client per request is slight overhead; could be cached at module level if latency becomes a concern.
Frontend LogVisit.jsx auto-stop uses `s + 1 >= 110` in setInterval — functional but relies on stale closure; acceptable given short recording cap.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable idle-state assertions (live mic record cannot be exercised in headless)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded data via /api/seed/init (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice endpoint /api/visits/transcribe is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_voice_transcription.py (synthesizes a 1s sine WAV in-memory — Whisper returns 200 with possibly empty text; any 200 + text:str is considered pass). Regression suites test_iter4_itero_invisalign.py and test_commercial_and_control_tower.py both green. LogVisit Step 1 uses a modal picker: click [data-testid='doctor-picker-btn'], then a [data-testid^='doctor-option-'], then [data-testid='step1-next-btn'] to reach Step 2 where voice-record-btn appears. Remember to export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL before running regression (shell-level env is needed).
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — feature testing, no bugs found.
